characters.name: ORAV OLLI
characters.description: Väike pruun orav koheva sabaga, seljas väike roheline vest, suured uudishimulikud silmad ja sõbralik naeratav nägu. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: MÄGER MADIS
characters.description: Suur hall-musta triibuline mäger, kandmas väikseid ümaraid prille ja sinist põlle, sõbralik ja abivalmis näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Mäger Madise Töökoja
locations.description: Cozy wooden workshop with light brown wooden walls and a sturdy wooden floor. A large workbench with various tools (hammer, saw, ruler) is in the center. A single window on the back wall shows green spring trees outside. Shelves with wooden blocks line one wall. Warm, inviting light. Cartoon style.

locations.name: Kevadine Aed
locations.description: Sunny spring garden with vibrant green grass and a large, leafy oak tree. A few small, colorful spring flowers (like crocuses) are blooming on the grass. The sky is bright blue with fluffy white clouds. Gentle sunlight. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, stands on his tiptoes looking out a window in a cozy wooden workshop. He points a paw at a tiny bird fluttering outside. Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, stands nearby, looking at Olli with a gentle smile. The workshop has light brown wooden walls, a wooden floor, and a workbench in the center. Green spring trees are visible through the window. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, stands thoughtfully in his cozy wooden workshop, his paw on his chin. Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, looks up at Madis expectantly. The workshop has light brown wooden walls, a wooden floor, and a workbench in the center. Green spring trees are visible through the window. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, and Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, are standing at a sturdy wooden workbench in the workshop. They are looking at various wooden blocks and small planks laid out on the workbench. Madis holds a small wooden plank. The workshop has light brown wooden walls, a wooden floor, and shelves with wooden blocks on one wall. Green spring trees are visible through the window. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, carefully saws a wooden board on the workbench in his cozy wooden workshop. Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, stands beside him, watching with interest, holding a small ruler. The workshop has light brown wooden walls, a wooden floor, and various tools are on the workbench. Green spring trees are visible through the window. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, is gently hammering two small wooden pieces together on the workbench. Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, holds one of the wooden pieces steady with both paws, concentrating hard. The workshop has light brown wooden walls, a wooden floor, and tools like a hammer are visible on the workbench. Green spring trees are visible through the window. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, and Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, are standing proudly looking at a nearly completed wooden birdhouse on the workbench in their cozy wooden workshop. The birdhouse is simple and well-built. The workshop has light brown wooden walls, a wooden floor, and tools are neatly arranged on the workbench. Green spring trees are visible through the window. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, and Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, are carefully carrying the wooden birdhouse out of the workshop into a sunny spring garden. The birdhouse is between them. They walk on vibrant green grass towards a large oak tree. Small colorful spring flowers are blooming on the grass. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, stands on a small stool, carefully attaching the wooden birdhouse to the trunk of a large, leafy oak tree in a sunny spring garden. Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, stands below, looking up at Madis and the birdhouse with excitement. Vibrant green grass and small colorful spring flowers are around the tree. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

The wooden birdhouse is now securely attached to the large oak tree in a sunny spring garden. Several small, happy birds are flying around the birdhouse, chirping joyfully. Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, and Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, are standing next to the tree, watching the birds with delighted expressions. Vibrant green grass and small colorful spring flowers are around them. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.

Orav Olli, wearing his green vest, and Mäger Madis, wearing his blue apron and glasses, are standing side-by-side next to the large oak tree in a sunny spring garden. The birdhouse is visible on the tree, and a small bird is peeking out of its opening. Olli and Madis are both smiling happily, looking at the birdhouse. Vibrant green grass and small colorful spring flowers are around them. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style.
